data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for link shortening for booking links, but there is no evidence provided that confirms this functionality is implemented or operational. The linked use case outlines the need for link shortening, yet the prior step evidence does not include any API reads or state checks that demonstrate this feature. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence regarding the requirement for link shortening.
gaps: No evidence of link shortening functionality for booking links.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract for link shortening
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the API successfully shortens booking links as required.
